name: Backlink Profile Audit
note: Full backlink data requires DataForSEO or Ahrefs API access which was not available during this audit session. Assessment is based on the InLink Rank (DA) score of 29 from init, indirect signals, and site structure observations.

domain_authority.context: DA 29 is moderate for a financial services site. Competitors Nimble (ETV 114K) and CashTrain (ETV 81K) likely have DA 40-60+. The gap in DA is a significant contributor to the ETV gap.
domain_authority.interpretation: A DA of 29 means the site likely has: ~100-300 referring domains, predominantly Australian-focused, with some directory and local citation links. For an ASIC-regulated lender operating since ~2000 (25+ years), this DA is lower than expected — suggesting historical link building has been modest.

citations_page.finding: The site has a /citations/ page (indexable — should be noindexed) suggesting an active citation/directory link-building program. This is appropriate for local SEO.
citations_page.implication: Citation links contribute to local pack rankings but have limited impact on organic domain authority.

regulatory_links.finding: Site is AFCA-registered (member 43334) — AFCA member directory listing is a high-authority .org.au backlink opportunity. ASIC's MoneySmart and financial counsellor resources may provide additional .gov.au link opportunities.
regulatory_links.afca_directory: Being an AFCA member typically provides a profile page at afca.org.au — this is a DA ~70+ link
regulatory_links.asic_connect: Credit licensees appear on ASIC Connect — .gov.au link

apply_subdomain.finding: apply.surecash.com.au (Microsoft IIS server) is the loan application platform. External links to this subdomain may exist but are less valuable for the main domain unless structured with canonical or redirect strategy.
apply_subdomain.server: Microsoft IIS/10.0 — different technology stack from main site (LiteSpeed)

link_building_opportunities.effort: Low — already registered, ensure website URL is correct
Medium — requires content partnership or resource page inclusion

link_building_opportunities.priority: MEDIUM — already partially done per /citations/ page

link_building_opportunities.opportunity: Financial comparison sites (Canstar, Finder, Compare the Market)
link_building_opportunities.priority: HIGH — major organic traffic driver for competitors

link_building_opportunities.opportunity: Local NSW news and community sites (financial topics)

link_building_opportunities.authority: High if placed in finance media
link_building_opportunities.priority: MEDIUM — builds E-E-A-T signals alongside links

nimble_com_au.context: Listed on Finder, Canstar, RateCity — comparison site links are likely a major contributor to DA and ETV. National advertising presence. Pure-play online lender with significant link building investment.

cashtrain_com_au.context: Strong SERP presence suggests either high DA or highly-optimised content, likely supported by comparison site listings.

competitor_link_assessment.key_insight: Comparison site listings (Finder, Canstar, RateCity) appear to be the most impactful link type in this industry. These sites send direct referral traffic AND provide high-authority backlinks. Surecash's absence from these is likely a significant gap.

link_risks.toxic_links: Cannot assess without full Ahrefs/DataForSEO backlink data
link_risks.anchor_text: Cannot assess without full backlink data
link_risks.historical_note: For a 25-year-old business, some historical links may be from deprecated directories or low-quality sources. A full disavow analysis should be performed via GSC/Search Console after pulling full backlink data from DataForSEO.

internal_link_structure.link_equity_flow: Homepage → Product pages via navigation. Homepage → Location pages via navigation. Product pages do NOT link to location pages. Location pages do NOT link to product pages.
internal_link_structure.orphan_risk: Admin pages (leads, citations, brand-page, lm-buy) receive internal links via sitemap inclusion but no meaningful editorial links
internal_link_structure.improvement: Adding cross-links between product and location pages would improve internal PageRank distribution

recommendations.action: Verify and optimise AFCA member directory listing — ensure surecash.com.au is the listed URL
Verify ASIC Connect profile has correct website URL
Apply for Finder and Canstar product listings — these provide high-DA editorial links and direct referral traffic
Ensure Google Business Profile listings for all 4 branches are fully optimised with correct NAP, hours, categories, photos
Complete citation building to major Australian business directories (ensure consistent NAP)
Explore AFIA (Australian Finance Industry Association) membership/listing
Create linkable financial resource content (guides, tools) that can earn editorial links
Commission full backlink audit via DataForSEO or Ahrefs to identify toxic links and disavow candidates
